name: Polymarket
description: Trade Polymarket prediction markets from your TON wallet: list/inspect markets, place/cancel orders, manage positions and balance, and bridge TON ↔ USDC (Polygon) via ChangeNOW.

EVM_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Dedicated Polygon EVM private key (0x + 64 hex) used to sign Polymarket orders and USDC transfers.

POLY_API_SECRET.description: Polymarket CLOB API secret (base64url HMAC key).

CHANGENOW_API_KEY.description: ChangeNOW API key for the TON ↔ USDC bridge.

tools.name: polymarket_list_markets
tools.description: List active Polymarket markets ordered by volume, optionally filtered by tag

tools.name: polymarket_get_market
tools.description: Get a single Polymarket market by slug with outcomes, prices, and token ids

tools.name: polymarket_get_orderbook
tools.description: Get the live CLOB order book for an outcome token

tools.name: polymarket_place_order
tools.description: Place a limit order on a Polymarket outcome (BUY/SELL, price, size)

tools.name: polymarket_cancel_order
tools.description: Cancel an open Polymarket order by id

tools.name: polymarket_get_positions
tools.description: Get current Polymarket positions for the plugin EVM wallet

tools.name: polymarket_get_balance
tools.description: Get USDC (Polygon) and TON balances for the trading wallets

tools.name: polymarket_deposit
tools.description: Bridge TON to USDC on Polygon to fund Polymarket trading (ChangeNOW)

tools.name: polymarket_withdraw
tools.description: Bridge USDC on Polygon back to TON (ChangeNOW)

tools.name: polymarket_swap_status
tools.description: Check the status of a ChangeNOW bridge swap by id
